---
name: General Issue
about: Anything that does not fit the Bug or Feature templates; e.g. documentation
  gaps, CI problems, dependency updates.
title: "[General]: "
labels: triage
assignees: ''

---

Use this template only when none of the other templates fit your needs.
For informal discussion or questions, please use [Stan Discourse](https://discourse.mc-stan.org/) instead.

## Pre-submission checklist

- [ ] I have read and understood the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and confirmed that this is not a duplicate. I have linked any related issues.
- [ ] If this issue is about a refactor or a larger change: I acknowledge the community must first discuss and reach a decision before any implementation begins.
- [ ] If this issue involves a notebook (`.ipynb` / `.Rmd` / `.qmd`): Any example or reference notebook I provide knits / renders successfully in a clean local environment.
- [ ] **AI use:** If I used an AI tool to help draft this issue, I have reviewed the output carefully and confirm that all information is accurate and personally verified.

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the issue, gap, or topic you want to track. -->

## Current situation

<!-- What is the current state and why is it a problem or worth addressing? -->

## Expected outcome

**Status:**
- [ ] The expected outcome is clear and I have described it below.
- [ ] The expected outcome is not yet clear and needs to be discussed in this thread before any work begins.

<!-- Describe what a successful resolution looks like. Be specific enough that contributors and maintainers can evaluate and approve the approach before work begins. If the outcome is still unclear, describe the open questions instead and tick the "needs discussion" box above. -->

## Suggested approach

<!-- Optional. If you have an idea of how to address this, describe it here. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Optional. Links, related issues, prior art, or any other relevant information. -->
